message: Node started: Investigate if there exists an integer n such that 2023*n is a power of 2. If not, investigate if there exists an n such that 2023*n is the sum of two powers of 2 (i.e., k(n) = 2). This can be done by checking if 2023 divides 2^a + 2^b for some integers a and b, which is equivalent to checking if 2^a + 2^b is congruent to 0 modulo 2023, or 2^(a-b) is congruent to -1 modulo 2023 (assuming a > b).
